failures.description: ProductCatalogSearch timed out, so the agent could not retrieve the catalog evidence needed to determine whether item 1507389580 has RAM=8GB.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The agent's goal and plan were correct: use ProductCatalogSearch with the provided item_id and product_id, then answer from returned evidence. The tool invocation at index 3 was well-formed and used the correct arguments. The tool explicitly returned an infrastructure/connectivity-style error: a dependency timeout after 30000ms. This prevented evidence retrieval and was not resolved later in the trajectory.
